SEARCH
Package server.controller

Class MonthlyReportService

java.lang.Object
server.controller.MonthlyReportService
public class MonthlyReportService extends Object
Service responsible for generating statistical HTML reports. It processes order and waiting list data, creates two HTML reports (Customer/Financial and Time/Performance), and compresses them into a ZIP file.

  • Constructor Details

    • MonthlyReportService

      public MonthlyReportService()

  • Method Details

    • generateHtmlReports

      public void generateHtmlReports(int month, int year, List<Order> orders, List<WaitingList> waitingList)
      Main method to generate monthly reports. Calculates statistics, creates the HTML files, and zips the result.
      Parameters:
      month - The month of the report.
      year - The year of the report.
      orders - List of orders for the specified month.
      waitingList - List of waiting list entries for the specified month.

    • isOrderFromWaitingList

      private boolean isOrderFromWaitingList(Order order, List<WaitingList> waitingListLog)
      Checks if a specific order originated from the waiting list.

      This method cross-references the order with the monthly waiting list log. It matches entries based on the customer ID and the specific date of the visit.

      Parameters:
      order - The order to check.
      waitingListLog - The list of all waiting list entries for the month.
      Returns:
      true if the customer was found in the waiting list for that date; false otherwise.

    • createCustomerReport

      private void createCustomerReport(String path, int m, int y, double revenue, int subs, int regs, int[] dailyOrds, int[] dailyWait, int[] weeklyDist, List<Order> orders)
      Generates the "Financial & Customer Report" HTML file. Includes revenue data, customer segmentation, and demand trends.

    • createTimeReport

      private void createTimeReport(String path, int m, int y, int[] hourly, int[] punctuality, int[] duration, List<WaitingList> wList, List<Order> orders)
      Generates the "Times & Performance Report" HTML file. Includes arrival times, punctuality statistics, and visit duration.

    • appendTimeLogTable

      private void appendTimeLogTable(StringBuilder sb, List<Order> orders)
      Helper method to create a detailed HTML table showing booking times, actual arrival, and delay calculations.

      private void appendOrderTable(StringBuilder sb, List<Order> orders)
      Helper method to create a simple financial log table for the report.
